theme.style: Warm domestic energy inspired by cooking flames and Myanmar sunset skies, blending deep burnt orange with molten amber and soft coral light. Smooth gradients evoke gas flame warmth and reliability, with a clean modern glass-like polish that feels trustworthy rather than industrial. Lighting is soft and radiant like a stove flame glow, textures are silky and fluid, never harsh or metallic.

slides.label: Home Screen
slides.backgroundPrompt: Abstract digital art with sweeping warm gradient waves flowing diagonally across the frame, deep burnt orange blending into molten amber and soft coral, evoking the glow of a cooking flame. Soft volumetric light rays emanate from the lower right, casting a radiant warm bloom across smooth glass-like ribbons of color. The upper 30% fades into a calmer deep orange-brown for text clarity, with fine grain texture and gentle depth of field blur at the edges, 8K quality, ultra smooth gradients, premium feel, no text, no letters, no UI elements, no device mockups

slides.label: Order Brand Selection
slides.backgroundPrompt: Abstract digital art featuring soft floating geometric shards of frosted amber and pale coral glass, arranged in a gentle diagonal cluster against a warm cream-orange backdrop. Cinematic lighting from the top-left casts golden highlights along each shard edge, creating subtle glass morphism layers with soft shadows beneath. The upper portion of the frame stays calm and minimal with muted warm tones for text overlay, fine soft grain and smooth depth blur toward the lower edges, 8K quality, ultra smooth gradients, premium feel, no text, no letters, no UI elements, no device mockups

slides.label: Order Pricing
slides.backgroundPrompt: Bold 3D rendered scene with layered translucent planes of warm amber and golden yellow glass stacked at angles, each edge glowing with thin lines of bright accent light in warm yellow. Dramatic side lighting from the right creates strong contrast between deep orange shadows and bright golden highlights, giving a sense of clarity and structure. The top 30% of the composition fades into a darker burnt orange tone for calm text space, with crisp smooth gradients and subtle atmospheric haze, 8K quality, ultra smooth gradients, premium feel, no text, no letters, no UI elements, no device mockups

slides.label: Login Screen
slides.backgroundPrompt: Abstract digital art with a single massive soft sphere of warm amber light glowing from the lower center, bleeding outward into deep orange and coral gradients across the full frame. Gentle wisps of translucent warm smoke drift upward, catching soft rim light from below, while the upper region stays darker and more subdued for text legibility. Fine particle grain and smooth radial gradients create an inviting, simple atmosphere, 8K quality, ultra smooth gradients, premium feel, no text, no letters, no UI elements, no device mockups
